label: FACIS SFTP — Health & Metrics
info:
GET /api/v1/sftp/health  → {status, service, polling}
GET /sftp/metrics         → Prometheus text format

Metric families (mirrors src/main.py:36-56):
  facis_sftp_files_ingested_total{extension}
  facis_sftp_records_published_total
  facis_sftp_poll_errors_total
  facis_sftp_dlq_total{error_type}              (NEW vs Python)
  facis_sftp_poll_duration_seconds              (histogram, buckets [0.1,0.5,1,5,10,30,60])

Paths are namespaced by service to avoid colliding with the Simulation
flow's /api/v1/health and /metrics on the shared ORCE pod (BREAKING
CHANGE vs the Python service).

Catch-all uncaught errors fan into sftp.dlq with error_type='uncaught'.

name: health body
build prometheus text
format uncaught for DLQ
